title: SpecX Role Spec
purpose: Define the SpecX compiler role for converting agent contracts into role, execution, and output specs.
responsibilities: Generate a machine-checkable contract for each agent node.
Compile the contract into canonical JSON.
Backtest runtime binding and output contract validity.
Emit role, execution, and output specs only from verified compiled contracts.
prohibitions: Do not generate generic output contracts.
Do not mark runtime binding verified before backtest success.
Do not skip role, execution, or output spec artifacts for agent nodes.
